calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Michael A. Canatellas Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's application for default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 01:51:25 p.m. and concluding at 02:17:27 p.m.

Plaintiff Michael A. Canatella appearing represented by Gilbert James Premo, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference and is placed under oath.
Defendant David S. Mudway appearing in pro per and is placed under oath.
Defendant Robert Earl Guillory not appearing.
Defendant REG CONSTRUCTION aka R E G CONSTRUCTION not appearing.

Order Granting Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application for Waiver of Witness Requirement and Permission to Proceed by Declaration on Plaintiff's Application for Default Judgment filed Apr-27-2023.

Defendant David S. Mudway appearing in default status. Default as to Defendant on Dec-28-2022.

Court recites facts of complaint as set forth on the record.

The Court has reviewed the following:

1. Plaintiff's Complaint for Damages for Breach of Contract filed on Sep-28-2022
2. Plaintiff's Application for Default Judgment filed Feb-28-2023
3. Request for Entry of Court Judgment by Default filed Feb-28-2023
4. Memorandum of Costs filed Feb-28-2023
5. Declaration of Plaintiff A. Canatella in Support of Plaintiff's Application for Default Judgment filed Feb-28-2023
6. Declaration of Mark Stephen in Support of Plaintiff's Application for Default Judgment filed Feb-28-2023
7. Declaration of Gilber J. Premo in Support of Plaintiff's Application for Default Judgment filed Feb-28-2023
8. Request for Attorney Fees and Interest

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Certified Copy of Recorded Grant Deed to Subject Property
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Letterhead of REG CONSTRUCTION with Estimate
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 3 - Contractor's Bond issued to REG CONSTRUCTION
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 4 - Photo of Plastic Contractors License Card for REG CONSTRUCTION
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 5 - Proposal (Contract)
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 6 - Change Orders
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 7 - Certified Copy of Recorded Mechanic's Lien
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 8 - List of Checks, and Copies of checks to Mudway and REG
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 9 - Consultant's Report
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 10 - Certified Copy of Amended Petition for Dissolution of Marriage

The matter is submitted.
The Court is satisified that the Plaintiff has carried their bourdon to prove their damages.

Court grants Plaintiff Unlicensed Contractor Penalty pursuant to Civil Code of Procedure 1029.8(c) and interest for 155 days at a rate of $49.59 per day. Court awards the sum of $7,686.45 in Interest.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Michael A. Canatella and against Defendants David S. Mudway, Robert Earl Guillory, and REG CONSTRUCTION aka R E G CONSTRUCTION, as follows:

1. Damages: $181,009.59
2. Costs: $808.66
3. Prejudgment Interest: $7,686.45
4. Attorney Fees: $20,000.00
5. CCP Penalty 1029.8(c): $10,000.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $219,504.70
Proposed judgment signed as modified.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Continued To Jul-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
